name: Dexin Corporation
summary: Dexin Corporation manufactures and sells IT cordless solutions and high-level devices in Taiwan. The company offers audio and entertainment products, including Bluetooth headsets and speakers, gaming headsets, and audiophile headphones; and computer peripherals and consumer electronic devices, such as office and gaming mouse products, keyboards, and game controllers. It also provides industrial design, research and development, product engineering and manufacturing, and other custom and project design services. Dexin Corporation was founded in 1997 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
